name: fp-lean-print
description: LuaLaTeX PDF layout support for Functional Programming in Lean.

scripts.latex:build: mkdir -p tmp/texmf-var latex-prototype/build && TEXMFVAR=$PWD/tmp/texmf-var TEXMFCACHE=$PWD/tmp/texmf-var latexmk -lualatex -interaction=nonstopmode -halt-on-error -outdir=latex-prototype/build latex-prototype/evaluating-expressions.tex
scripts.latex:build:book: mkdir -p tmp/texmf-var latex-prototype/build && TEXMFVAR=$PWD/tmp/texmf-var TEXMFCACHE=$PWD/tmp/texmf-var latexmk -lualatex -interaction=nonstopmode -halt-on-error -outdir=latex-prototype/build latex-prototype/fp-lean.tex
